_comment: Single source of truth for model assignments. Edit this file to swap models -- no other files need to change.

master.name: Claude 4.6 Opus
master.role: Right Hemisphere -- planning, architecture, code review, strategy

implementer.name: Gemini 3 Flash
implementer.role: Left Hemisphere -- TDD implementation, sequential coding, tool calling

verifier.name: Gemini 3 Flash
verifier.role: Validation -- readonly test runner, summary debt checker

mid_tier.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
mid_tier.when: Only used when implementer returns SURPRISE with high deviation or ESCALATE requiring re-analysis
